prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on the Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model, a common statistical method for stock price forecasting. The current price of COST is $1002.77. The prediction horizon is 22 trading days (approximately 0.0873 years, assuming 252 trading days per year). Historical data (typically the last 3-5 years) is used to estimate key parameters: an annualized drift (average return) of 22% and an annualized volatility (standard deviation of returns) of 23%. The point estimate represents the median of the projected log-normal price distribution, reflecting the expected value given these historical parameters. Confidence intervals are calculated using the properties of the log-normal distribution and corresponding Z-scores for each confidence level. It's important to note that this is a statistical model based on historical data; actual future prices can deviate significantly due to unforeseen market events, company-specific news, and general economic conditions. This is not financial advice.
